name: Intersection of Two Linked Lists
description: Given the heads of two singly linked lists, return the node at which they intersect. If no intersection, return null. The lists do not have cycles. After function returns, lists must retain their original structure.
constraints: listA has m nodes. listB has n nodes. 1 <= m, n <= 3 * 10^4. 1 <= Node.val <= 10^5.

accepted_time: O(n + m) with O(n) visited set
performance.stress_intent: exercise long prefix and shared-tail combinations that punish nested pointer comparison instead of length-alignment or pointer-switching passes
